pullRequest.title: gui: elide long filenames with tooltip in document list
pullRequest.body: When a file with a very long name is selected, the application window would resize awkwardly or push elements out of the viewport. For example (_on Fedora Linux_), without this fix, the **"Start another conversion"** button gets pushed completely off-screen when selecting a file with a long filename, making it impossible for the user to trigger another conversion. See the "Before" image below. This PR improves the UI by: 1. Using `QFontMetrics.elidedText()` with `ElideMiddle` to shorten the displayed filename if it exceeds the available width. 2. Adding a tooltip to the filename label so that the full path is still visible on hover. Fixes #143 **Before** **After**

pullRequest.title: fix: Add missing MIME types to .desktop file
pullRequest.body:
The Linux desktop entry was missing several supported MIME types. This PR adds the following to `press.freedom.dangerzone.desktop`:

- `application/x-hwp`
- `application/x-hwp-template`
- `application/vnd.oasis.opendocument.text-template`
- `application/vnd.oasis.opendocument.spreadsheet-template`
- `application/vnd.oasis.opendocument.presentation-template`

These formats were already handled by the conversion logic but wouldn't appear in "Open With" menus for these file types.

Fixes #646

pullRequest.title: Tests: pass a bigger timeout for slow systems.
CI: Run macOS Intel tests only nightly
pullRequest.body:
Run macOS Intel tests only on scheduled/manual runs as they take ~2.5 hours

Fix #1338

pullRequest.title: Exclude dangerzone-machine from Linux packages
pullRequest.body:
Resolves: https://github.com/freedomofpress/dangerzone/issues/1404

I decided to make a minimal change on the level of the package builders themselves instead of more upstream in e.g `setup.py`. This to avoid breaking other build-flows and development ergonomics.

pullRequest.title: docs: Fix broken links and standardize CHANGELOG.md
pullRequest.body:
Fixes broken links and formats the full changelog history.

Fixes #1445

- Replaced broken `compare/` diff URLs with clean `releases/tag/` links.
- Added UTC release dates from GitHub release history to all version headings.
- Fixed markdown hierarchy where `##` was incorrectly used for sub-categories.
- Standardized all version headings down to `v0.1`.
